title: Western Neon Signs
hero_alt: Western Neon Signs, by Peter de Lory
pullQuote: A documentary project of the kind that doesn't get made anymore, because the subject no longer exists.
body: For some twenty years Peter de Lory photographed the disappearing neon of the American West — shooting color and black-and-white simultaneously. It is a documentary project of a kind that can no longer be repeated, because its subject has largely gone.
